Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: It's... is that poutine? The plate bears fries that are, well, fried to perfection, the gravy thick, and the cheese curds far too fresh for something that can't be easily sourced atop a tree. This isn't actually some obscure French dish that superficially resembles that of the Québécois, right?

Line.Text: Yet, despite his (or his lookalike's) rant from a while back, he's munching on this thing with as much gusto as he devoured... well, as you'd imagine that he would devour one of his precious baguettes, sans anxiety.
